description_long: This is a dark metallic helmet with a smooth, rounded dome and a pronounced brow ridge, reminiscent of ancient Greek or Corinthian styles. The front features two large, angular eye openings and a central nose guard, providing both visibility and facial protection. The helmet extends downward to cover the cheeks and sides of the head, with a continuous, seamless surface and no visible seams or attachments. The back is fully enclosed, offering complete cranial coverage, and the surface has a slightly reflective, worn finish with subtle textural variations. There are no visible ventilation holes, decorative elements, or branding on the exterior. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, prioritizing protection and durability.
description: A dark, metallic, full-coverage helmet with angular eye openings and a central nose guard, featuring a smooth, slightly reflective surface and no visible decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular eye openings, central nose guard, and cheek coverage.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the smooth, rounded back and full cranial enclosure.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the helmet's dome shape and continuous surface.
description_view_3: Opposite rear-side view, again emphasizing the helmet's seamless back and side protection.
